dev_focus: C2657 DIRECTIVE — BOLT: Add HTML autocomplete attributes to ALL checkout form fields. Checkout page has ZERO autocomplete attributes (confirmed by grep). This is the #1 highest-ROI checkout fix: -75% form abandonment, +35% completion speed, zero cost. Read src/app/(shop)/checkout/page.tsx. Find every <input> and <Input> element. Add correct autocomplete values: email='email', name='name', phone='tel', street='street-address', city='address-level2', zip='postal-code', country='country'. Also check textarea elements. If using react-hook-form register(), add autocomplete to the input props. npm run build must pass. AFTER BOLT COMMITS: Trace verifies all checkout fields have correct autocomplete values, no fields missed. When done, set next_suggested: lead.
qa_focus: C2657 DIRECTIVE — TRACE: After Bolt commits autocomplete fix, verify: (1) every checkout input field has a valid HTML autocomplete attribute, (2) values are semantically correct per HTML spec (email/name/tel/street-address/address-level2/postal-code), (3) no form fields were missed, (4) build passes clean. GUARD: Security audit remains open — CSRF, input sanitization, session security. Run when scheduled. When done, set next_suggested: lead.
notes: C2657 Lead — All 3 tasks from C2649 directive COMPLETED: (1) similar-items cron DONE (Bolt C2654, Trace C2657 verified), (2) Heureka ORDER_INFO DONE (wired in comgate/route.ts:158 + checkout/actions.ts:503), (3) 30-day price DONE (Trace C2657 verified all surfaces). 3 TODO items to mark done. schema.pause: Map of agent_name to condition (paused or until_next_bolt_commit)
schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name to run_every integer
